meaning: n.<美>(游艺场中的)旋转木马
examples: "I thought the carrousel was closed in the wintertime," old phoebe said.
We are playing the carrousel over a cup of coke. We are very pleased.
The funnel led to a carrousel of seventy-four quartz vials in its belly.
The carrousel structure remains, tinged with the risks of a more treacherous age: A meets B, B meets C, and so on.
